title: MODIFICATIONS

content_blocks.text:
SJN *** K11 U3 00000
*: Any of the possibilities. See Vehicle Identification Number arrangement.
• Introduction of NATS immobiliser upgrade (integrated antenna, rolling code)
• Introduction of VJZ diesel engine (LHD vehicles only)

• New manual transmission for diesel engine
• Common use of RS5F30A transmission for petrol engines

• Introduction of passenger air bag
• Exterior changes (hood, fenders, bumpers, etc.)
• Interior changes (trim, instrument panel, etc.)
• Introduction of superlock on RHD models
• Introduction of ABS on rear drum brake

model_notes: VJZ diesel engine introduced for LHD vehicles only. Superlock introduced on RHD models.
